active_cycle.goal: Drive bounded responsive-tree architecture objectives while preserving evidence, pilot, and readiness boundaries and removing artificial queue churn.

tasks.title: Throughput control-plane hardening
tasks.objective: Replace one-task-per-run and fixed fifth-task refresh contracts with enforceable objective-level throughput policy, same-head CI recovery, and anti-bookkeeping rules.
allowed_work: Implement the bounded objective and same-scope tests or documentation.
Update queue, ledger, status, schemas, validators, and generated artifacts only when they materially enforce or record the semantic transition.
Preserve evidence, pilot, readiness, production, and release truth boundaries.

Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not upgrade readiness, production, release, live-render, export, accessibility, or pixel claims.
acceptance_criteria: Objective-level throughput policy is enforced by schema and validator.
Same-head Validate workflow dispatch exists.
Artificial reserve tasks are terminal or absent.
